mapper.select: SELECT DeptID AS departmentID, DeptName AS departmentName, SupportChannels AS supportChannels, DATE_FORMAT(LateStartTime, '%H:%i:%s') AS lateStartTime, GraceMinutes AS graceMinutes, LateEnabled AS lateEnabled FROM Departments WHERE DeptID = #{departmentID}

SELECT DeptID AS departmentID, DeptName AS departmentName, SupportChannels AS supportChannels, DATE_FORMAT(LateStartTime, '%H:%i:%s') AS lateStartTime, GraceMinutes AS graceMinutes, LateEnabled AS lateEnabled FROM Departments ORDER BY DeptID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Departments ( DeptName, SupportChannels, LateStartTime, GraceMinutes, LateEnabled ) VALUES ( #{departmentName}, #{supportChannels}, #{lateStartTime}, #{graceMinutes}, #{lateEnabled} )
mapper.update: UPDATE Departments SET DeptName = #{departmentName}, SupportChannels = #{supportChannels}, LateStartTime = #{lateStartTime}, GraceMinutes = #{graceMinutes}, LateEnabled = #{lateEnabled} WHERE DeptID = #{departmentID}
